name: property managers processing 5–15 leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We provide automated lease abstraction instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of lease terms and deadlines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tracking of lease terms and deadlines.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We provide automated lease abstraction instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We provide automated lease abstraction instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
